name: C
introduction: C is a powerful programming language widely used in the industry for building robust software applications.
history: Originally created decades ago, C has evolved significantly, adding modern features and an expansive ecosystem.
whyLearn: Learning C opens up massive career opportunities and gives you a strong foundation in algorithmic thinking.
setupGuide:
1. Download the compiler/interpreter. 
2. Set up your IDE (VS Code or IntelliJ). 
3. Run your first Hello World program.

topics.title: Variables & Data Types
topics.content: Learn how to declare variables and manage primitive types.

topics.title: Control Flow & Loops
topics.content: Master if statements, switch cases, and loops (for, while).

topics.title: Functions & Scope
topics.content: Understand how to modularize your code using reusable functions.

topics.title: Object Oriented Programming
topics.content: Classes, Inheritance, Polymorphism, and Encapsulation.

topics.title: Advanced Memory & Multithreading
topics.content: Handle complex operations securely and concurrently.
